title: Spear Essentials
description: A resource pack that includes everything needed for Spear PVP and more!
body:
This resource pack was made specifically for **Spear PvP**.
Although it is a pack aiming to the **Spear kit** it includes everything in order to play PvP smoothly with a clean gameplay and fits simpler tasks such as _survival_.


Even though I am the publisher of this resource pack I did not make everything this pack has to offer, everything that I took from other resource packs are listed in a _txt_ file inside the pack by the name of "Credits" due to parts of the pack belong to them(I couldn't find all the original publisher of the packs...).
